task: Place the silver spoon in the glass container and put the silver lid on the container.
raw:
SCENE ANALYSIS - A kitchen counter has a clear glass container with a silver lid, a white cup with a silver spoon, and a paper towel roll. The glass container is transparent with a flat lid; the cup is opaque with a handle; the spoon is metallic. STRATEGY - First, grasp the spoon from the cup, then transport it to the glass container and place it inside. Next, grasp the lid from the container, transport it to the cup, and place it on top. Failure modes include dropping the spoon or lid, or misplacing them. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the cup to grasp the spoon; Step 2 grasp the spoon from the cup; Step 3 transport the spoon to the glass container; Step 4 place the spoon inside the container; Step 5 grasp the lid from the container; Step 6 transport the lid to the cup; Step 7 place the lid on the cup.
Goal: inside(silver_spoon, glass_container); on(silver_lid, white_cup)
Scene: glass_container, white_cup, silver_spoon, silver_lid, paper_towel_roll
Step 1: reach(white_cup)
  affordance_region: the body of the white cup
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, white_cup, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, white_cup) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(silver_spoon)
  affordance_region: the handle of the silver spoon
  contact: holding(silver_spoon) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(silver_spoon)
Step 3: transport(silver_spoon -> glass_container)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the glass container
  spatial: inside(silver_spoon, glass_container) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(silver_spoon)
  done_when: inside(silver_spoon, glass_container)
Step 4: place(silver_spoon -> glass_container)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the glass container
  contact: surface_contact(silver_spoon, glass_container) [completion]; released(silver_spoon) [completion]
  pose: stable(silver_spoon) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(silver_spoon, glass_container) AND released(silver_spoon)
Step 5: reach(glass_container)
  affordance_region: the body of the glass container
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, glass_container, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, glass_container) < 0.03
Step 6: grasp(silver_lid)
  affordance_region: the flat surface of the silver lid
  contact: holding(silver_lid) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(silver_lid)
Step 7: transport(silver_lid -> white_cup)
  affordance_region: the top opening of the white cup
  spatial: above(silver_lid, white_cup, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(silver_lid)
  done_when: above(silver_lid, white_cup, 0.05)
Step 8: place(silver_lid -> white_cup)
  affordance_region: the top opening of the white cup
  contact: surface_contact(silver_lid, white_cup) [completion]; released(silver_lid) [completion]
  pose: stable(silver_lid) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(silver_lid, white_cup) AND released(silver_lid)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the white cup
the handle of the silver spoon
an empty area inside the glass container
an empty area inside the glass container
the body of the glass container
the flat surface of the silver lid
the top opening of the white cup
the top opening of the white cup
